blended.narrative: Lookout Pass is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 32 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: light rain showers, highs of 40°F.
Wednesday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Thursday: 7" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 8" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 5.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 4" over the past week. Current depth: 38".
